main.description: Get a skeleton of suggested users for the Explore page. Intended to be called and hydrated by app.bsky.unspecced.getSuggestedUsersForExplore

viewer.description: DID of the account making the request (not included for public/unauthenticated queries).

category.description: Category of users to get suggestions for.

recIdStr.description: Snowflake for this recommendation, use when submitting recommendation events.
